58.reason: 当在行尾且已提取单词时，未将word设置为字符串结束符'\0'，导致后续使用strcmp时读取越界内存，产生乱码单词。

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  当在行尾且已提取单词时，未将word设置为字符串结束符'\0'，导致后续使用strcmp时读取越界内存，产生乱码单词。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  当行末是字母时，word没有以'\0'结尾，导致后续字符串比较出错

127.reason: [The function binary_tree_create is declared to return struct node*, but here it returns an integer (1). This causes undefined behavior when the caller tries to use the returned value as a pointer. It should return NULL instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function binary_tree_create is declared to return struct node*, but here it returns an integer (1). This causes undefined behavior when the caller tries to use the returned value as a pointer. It should return NULL instead.]
